details: S=2048 PCC=0.99976, S=4096 PCC=0.99806 — load-bearing fp32 accumulator fix works

text: S=2048 bf16 mask=none: True-acc (fp32 CBs) rms=0.146 FAILS but False-acc (bf16 CBs) PASSES. fp32 should be better than bf16 — backwards result suggests fp32-CB format change introduced a reconfig/precision regression in the matmul or eltwise path. Probing rms across configs + HiFi4 before concluding.
Default math_fidelity HiFi2->HiFi4 when compute_kernel_config=None. Probe: HiFi4+fp32acc rel_rms=0.0145 vs HiFi2 0.146. Golden S=2048 bf16: all 8 pass (was 2 fail).
